redacted_summary: For user reports that a sandbox, bot, or instance is down or unresponsive, first direct them to use the console’s instance auto-repair feature. Recommend trying script-based repair before AI-based repair, and avoid applying this flow to billing, quota, or post-payment sleep issues. If the user already confirms both repair methods failed, escalate to the appropriate on-call or service owner rather than repeating the same repair guidance.
